channel.title: Trade Shows on
channel.description: Recent content in Trade Shows on

item.title: The Tradeshow Circus
item.description: Who forced the shift to digital? It’s a bit weird to think of it this way but without COVID and the cancelation of all tradeshows in 2020 I could never have proven the value of a complete shift to digital. The lead flow we generated without tradeshows demonstrated a much more cost effective spend of marketing dollars. Tradeshows are expensive: between the booth, travel, marketing, and sponsorships, showcasing your products at trade show exhibits can put a SERIOUS dent into your marketing budget.
